report.summary: Cycle 7 standup: 2 agent cycles since v6 (publish-v4 promoted 11 pages total today → 614 published, design-v4 polished omnichain-defi + stablecoin-payments). Git repo not accessible from sandbox — commit blocker persists. 28 total agent cycles today.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA FROM V6: 2 agent cycles completed since last standup — publish-v4 (promoted 11 pages across 4 batches today, total published now 614, ~709 remaining unpublished) and design-v4 (polished omnichain-defi + stablecoin-payments with OG images, accordion FAQs, accessibility fixes).
PUBLISHED SLUGS: 611 (v6) → 614 (publish-v4). +3 net since last standup, +7 net today from original 607. Publish queue sourced from 714 unpublished pages for batch 4 since formal queue was empty.
QA STATUS: Publish-v4 QA'd all 11 promoted pages — 11/11 page.tsx present, 11/11 metadata valid, 10/11 H1 headings present, 7/11 JSON-LD valid. Full build still OOM in sandbox.

DEPLOY STATUS: Git repo not accessible from this sandbox mount (.git missing). The 20 uncommitted files flagged since v4 standup remain unresolvable from agent context. Manual commit+push still needed by Jefe.
MARKET DATA: Egress blocked — no fresh price data. Last known: BTC $68,688, ETH $2,133, SOL $83.86, F&G 8 (Extreme Fear).
SEO SURFACE: 614 published slugs. 103 legacy missing page.tsx unchanged. 147 TS errors stable. Design-v4 improved accessibility (focus-visible, table attrs) on 2 pages.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE STATUS: 7th standup of Apr 1. Agent runs today: standup ×7 (this), build ×4, publish ×4, design ×4, community ×2, eod ×4. Total: 28 agent cycles (25 at v6 + publish + design + this standup).

V6 PRIORITIES STATUS: (1) Commit+push 20 uncommitted files — CANNOT DO (git not accessible from sandbox). (2) Promote RWA + CLARITY Act guides — DONE (publish-v4 promoted them as part of 11-page batch). (3) Batch-scaffold 103 missing page.tsx — NOT STARTED (no build cycle ran since v6).

COMPLETED SINCE V6: Publish-v4 ran 4th promotion batch (sourced unpublished pages after queue emptied). Design-v4 added missing OG image for omnichain-defi, accordion FAQ conversions, focus-visible styles, table accessibility attrs, fixed twitter card + canonical URL on stablecoin-payments.

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS: P0 — Git commit+push needed (agent cannot resolve — needs Jefe). P1 — 103 missing page.tsx (unchanged all day). P2 — 147 TS errors (stable, non-blocking). P3 — CoinGecko rate limit risk. P3 — defi-yields no stale fallback. P3 — 1/11 promoted pages missing H1, 4/11 batch-4 pages missing JSON-LD.
NEW: Publish-v4 sourced unpublished pages directly (bypassed empty queue). ~709 pages remain unpublished. Design polish now complete for all build-cycle pages.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — GIT COMMIT + PUSH (MANUAL): This has been the #1 blocker across 4 standups (v4→v7). Agent sandbox cannot access .git. Jefe needs to commit and push to trigger Vercel deploy. All 7 pages promoted today + design fixes are blocked from production.

PRIORITY 2 — BATCH-SCAFFOLD 103 MISSING PAGE.TXX: Carried over all day. 103 published slugs returning noindex = largest SEO gap. Next build cycle should prioritize scaffolding over new content. This is the highest-leverage automated task remaining.

PRIORITY 3 — FIX JSON-LD + H1 ON BATCH-4 PAGES: 4 of 5 batch-4 pages missing JSON-LD structured data, 1 page missing H1. Quick fix in next build or QA cycle — improves rich snippet eligibility for newly promoted pages.

metrics.label: 💰 Actual Cost — Today's Sprint
metrics.value: $2,041 (28 cycles: standup×7=$315, build×4=$932, publish×4=$220, design×4=$240, community×2=$82, eod×4=$252)

report.email: SKIPPED — api.resend.com fetch failed from Chrome (CORS/network restriction). Same limitation as previous cycles.
